resources.string: Terminal AI Agent · Powered by Rust
Workspace is empty.\nStart CLAURST to create files.
CLAURST binary not found for this device architecture.
ClaURST binary unavailable. Deploying fallback shell…
Terminal failed to start. Please close and reopen.

1. Open Terminal.
2. Wait until status shows "Terminal ready".
3. Tap terminal and type commands.
4. If ClaURST binary is unavailable, fallback shell will open.
5. Use Browse Workspace to inspect created files.

Permissions:
• Internet: required for network-enabled commands.
• Storage permissions are not required for normal operation.

Tip: Volume Down sends ESC in terminal mode.
